mapper.select: SELECT id, userId, name AS title, coverUrl, coverNetworkUrl, backgroundUrl, backgroundNetworkUrl, profile, createdAt, type, is_private AS isPrivate FROM playlists ORDER BY createdAt DESC

SELECT id, userId, name AS title, coverUrl, coverNetworkUrl, backgroundUrl, backgroundNetworkUrl, profile, createdAt, type, is_private AS isPrivate FROM playlists WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY createdAt DESC

SELECT id, userId, name AS title, coverUrl, coverNetworkUrl, backgroundUrl, backgroundNetworkUrl, profile, createdAt, type, is_private AS isPrivate FROM playlists WHERE type IN (1, 2) ORDER BY createdAt DESC
SELECT id, userId, name AS title, coverUrl, coverNetworkUrl, backgroundUrl, backgroundNetworkUrl, profile, createdAt, type, is_private AS isPrivate FROM playlists WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT s.id, s.artistId, s.title, s.coverUrl, s.fileUrl, s.duration, s.createdAt, s.external_source AS externalSource, s.external_id AS externalId FROM songs s INNER JOIN playlist_songs ps ON s.id = ps.songId WHERE ps.playlistId = #{playlistId} ORDER BY ps.addedAt ASC

SELECT s.id, s.artistId, s.title, s.coverUrl, s.fileUrl, s.duration, s.createdAt, ps.addedAt, s.external_source AS externalSource, s.external_id AS externalId, s.albumId, alb.name AS albumName FROM songs s INNER JOIN playlist_songs ps ON s.id = ps.songId LEFT JOIN albums alb ON s.albumId = alb.id WHERE ps.playlistId = #{playlistId} ORDER BY ps.addedAt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlists (userId, name, coverUrl, coverNetworkUrl, backgroundUrl, backgroundNetworkUrl, profile, type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{coverUrl}, #{coverNetworkUrl}, #{backgroundUrl}, #{backgroundNetworkUrl}, COALESCE(#{profile}, ''), #{type})
INSERT IGNORE INTO playlist_songs (playlistId, songId) VALUES (#{playlistId}, #{songId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM playlist_songs WHERE playlistId = #{playlistId} AND songId = #{songId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, userId, name AS title, coverUrl, backgroundUrl, profile, createdAt, type, is_private AS isPrivate FROM playlists WHERE userId = #{userId} AND name = '已点赞的歌曲' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_songs WHERE playlistId = #{playlistId} AND songId = #{songId}
